# Hiro Platform

The [Hiro Platform](https://platform.hiro.so) is a hosted developer platform for building on Stacks. It provides a suite of tools and services that help you develop, deploy, and monitor your smart contracts without managing infrastructure.

{% hint style="info" %}
Features in this section require a Hiro Platform account. [Sign up free](https://platform.hiro.so).
{% endhint %}

## Platform features

The following platform-specific features are documented in this section:

- [**Contract Monitoring**](contract-monitoring/README.md) - Track smart contract events in real-time and receive webhook notifications when specific activities occur.

## Getting started

1. Create an account at [platform.hiro.so](https://platform.hiro.so).
2. Explore the platform features listed above.
3. Follow the step-by-step guides to integrate platform tools into your workflow.

{% hint style="info" %}
### Need help with the Hiro Platform?

Reach out on the **#api** channel on [Discord](https://stacks.chat/) under the Hiro Developer Tools section.
{% endhint %}
